HDRtoNormalEnable.description: change to normal pipline while hdr and sdr are simmilar in DR

UIZoomRatioThreshToNormal.description: change to normal pipline while UI zoom ratio is larger than this threshold

i32defalutGammaTab.description: the gamma table is copy from the most bright part gamma lut in ipe gamma

i32defalutPortraitGammaTab.description: the Portrait gamma table is copy from the most bright part gamma lut in ipe gamma

number_lux.description: Control the number of segments in lux

a_OffsetHDR.description: Params for HDR to normal pipline

b_CoefHDR.description: Params for HDR to normal pipline

number_lux.description: Control the number of segments in lux

BlueBrightnessAdjust.description: The larger the value, the less blue brightness compensation

ThreshToNormalPercent.description: smaller than this value, switch to normal pipline,multiplied by 1000
